title: 第1節　花びらのトンネル
chapterTitle: 第2章　桜の折り返し
continuityNotes: This is the Sato-side first section of the blossom-tunnel incident paired with scene-002-001-002-sera.

prompt: Create one vertical smartphone-friendly scene illustration for a serial web novel. Do not render any readable text, chapter numbers, talk labels, section labels, captions, subtitles, logos, or UI overlays inside the image. Story context: 第2章　桜の折り返し / 第1話　朝のリズムが整う. Scene focus: 第1節　花びらのトンネル / サトーパート. Summary: 橋を越えてしばらくすると、足と呼吸がようやく同じ場所へ揃ってきた。速すぎず、遅すぎず、勝手に身体が前へ進む感覚がある。ジョギングでいちばん気持ちいいのは、たぶんこの区間だろう。… Key beats: 橋を越えてしばらくすると、足と呼吸がようやく同じ場所へ揃ってきた。速すぎず、遅すぎず、勝手に身体が前へ進む感覚がある。ジョギングでいちばん気持ちいいのは、たぶんこの区間だろう。サトーはジャケットのファスナーをもう少しだけ下げ、白鷺川沿いの緩いカーブへ身体を乗せた。 そこから先の遊歩道は、桜の枝が頭上で重なり、花びらのトンネルみたいになっている。風が通るたび、薄い桃色の膜が前から後ろへ流れた。地面に積もった花びらはきれいだが、走る側からすると少しだけ滑りやすい。その曖昧な手触りまで含めて、春の河川敷は悪くない。 カーブの先で、空のベビーカーを押した若い母親らしい人影が一度だけよろめいた。前輪が花びらの吹きだまりへ取られたのか、すぐ脇にいた男性が慌てて持ち直している。散り際の朝は小さな車輪ほど扱いづらいのだろう。サトーは自分の歩幅だけを少し丁寧に整えた。 誰も他人の朝へ踏み込みすぎない。その距離感が河川敷にはある。サトーはその気楽さごと、花びらの下を抜けていく。走ること自体が楽しいと感じる朝は、それだけで少し得をしたような気分になった。 Use the supplied character reference images to preserve these canonical looks: sato-jogging: サトー. Keep him as a mature 45-year-old Japanese man with long hair tied in a ponytail, mustache and chin beard, and a lean athletic build. In this novel he must always wear cool-weather jogging clothes, never denim or businesswear. sera-jogging: セラ. Keep her in a maid-inspired running outfit rather than an indoor maid dress, with silver-gray hair, golden eyes, black-and-white technical fabrics, and a clearly visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. Do not turn the outfit into armor or a generic tracksuit. Focus characters: sato-jogging. Keep them clearly readable in the foreground or midground. Continuity notes: This is the Sato-side first section of the blossom-tunnel incident paired with scene-002-001-002-sera. Keep the same curved riverside path, blossom canopy, and drifting petals in both images. In every scene of this novel, Sato must keep his canonical face, long ponytail, mustache, chin beard, and lean 45-year-old build, while wearing early-April jogging wear suited to a cool Tokyo morning: a light running jacket or windbreaker, technical long-sleeve top, tapered running pants, and running shoes. In every scene of this novel, Sera must keep her canonical face, silver-gray hair, golden eyes, and cat ears while wearing a maid-inspired jogging outfit built from black-and-white performance fabrics, with apron-line design cues, a short pleated running skirt over leggings, a light jacket, running shoes, and a visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. For Sato-part images, Sato must be the dominant subject and Sera, if visible, must stay clearly separated from him by distance, never adjacent, never shoulder-to-shoulder, and never readable as a companion; she may be visible in the distance or on another part of the path, but not as an extremely tiny speck. For Sera-part images, Sera must be the dominant subject, actively stopping a separate attacker who clearly does not resemble Sato. In every Sera-part image, Sato must remain an unaware background figure, non-combatant, not helping, facing away from the action or looking elsewhere, and not looking toward Sera, the attacker, or the incident. Never let any attacker resemble Sato in face, hair, beard, age, clothing, build, or silhouette. All human figures must have normal anatomy with exactly two arms and two hands.  Show Sato dominant running through a curved riverside tunnel of cherry blossoms, with petals sweeping across the path and a light, enjoyable cruising rhythm. If Sera appears, place her clearly apart from Sato near the outer edge of the path or under deeper shadows, never companion-like.
